Title: TC-001: Badge Disappears When Search Returns No Results (Bug Scenario)
Preconditions: User is logged in; Cart contains physical product; Pickup delivery option available
Steps:
1. Navigate to Cart page
2. Select "Pickup" delivery option
3. Click "select a pickup address" button
4. Click COUNTRY dropdown
5. Select "Australia"
6. Click COUNTRY dropdown again
7. Select "Canada"
8. Enter "TEST" in the Search field
9. Click Search button or press Enter
10. Observe COUNTRY button
Expected Result: COUNTRY button still shows "2" badge; Australia and Canada chips remain visible with close buttons

Title: TC-002: Badge Persists With Valid Search Results
Preconditions: User is logged in; Cart contains physical product; Pick points modal accessible
Steps:
1. Open "Pick points" modal
2. Select "United States of America" in COUNTRY filter
3. Search for "New York"
4. Observe COUNTRY button
5. Verify chips
Expected Result: Badge "1" remains visible; USA chip remains visible with close button; New York locations displayed

Title: TC-003: Badge Persists After Clearing Search (No Results → Results)
Preconditions: User is logged in; Pick points modal accessible
Steps:
1. Open "Pick points" modal
2. Select "Australia" and "Canada"
3. Search for "ZZZZZ" (no results)
4. Click "RESET SEARCH" or clear search field
5. Observe COUNTRY button
6. Verify pickup list
Expected Result: Badge "2" should be visible; Australia and Canada locations are displayed

Title: TC-004: Multiple Filter Badges With No Search Results
Preconditions: User is logged in; Pick points modal accessible
Steps:
1. Open "Pick points" modal
2. Select "Canada" in COUNTRY filter
3. Select "Ontario" in STATE/PROVINCE filter
4. Select "Toronto" in CITY filter
5. Search for "NONEXISTENT"
6. Observe all filter buttons
7. Verify all chips
Expected Result: All badges remain: COUNTRY "1", STATE/PROVINCE "1", CITY "1"; All chips visible

Title: TC-005: Single Country Filter With No Search Results
Preconditions: User is logged in; Pick points modal accessible
Steps:
1. Open "Pick points" modal
2. Select only "Japan" in COUNTRY filter
3. Search for "XYZ123"
4. Observe COUNTRY button
5. Observe Japan chip
Expected Result: Badge "1" remains visible; Japan chip with close button remains visible

Title: TC-006: Badge Updates After Removing Filter During No-Results State
Preconditions: User is logged in; Pick points modal accessible
Steps:
1. Open "Pick points" modal
2. Select "Australia" and "Canada"
3. Search for "INVALID"
4. Click close (×) on Australia chip
5. Observe COUNTRY button
6. Click close (×) on Canada chip
7. Observe COUNTRY button
Expected Result: After step 4: Badge shows "1"; After step 6: Badge disappears (no filters)

Title: TC-007: Reset Filters Button Clears Badge During No-Results State
Preconditions: User is logged in; Pick points modal accessible
Steps:
1. Open "Pick points" modal
2. Select multiple countries
3. Search for "NOTFOUND"
4. Click "Reset filters" button
5. Observe COUNTRY button
6. Observe chips area
7. Clear search
Expected Result: No badge displayed; No chips displayed; All pickup locations displayed after clearing search

Title: TC-008: Verify term_facets Contains Data When Search Has Results
Preconditions: DevTools available; Pick points modal accessible
Steps:
1. Open DevTools Network tab
2. Open "Pick points" modal
3. Select "Canada" filter
4. Search for "Toronto"
5. Inspect response term_facets
Expected Result: term_facets array contains facet data with terms and counts; totalCount > 0

Title: TC-009: Verify term_facets When Search Returns No Results
Preconditions: DevTools available; Pick points modal accessible
Steps:
1. Open DevTools Network tab
2. Select "Australia" and "Canada" filters
3. Search for "ZZZZNOTEXIST"
4. Inspect response
5. Inspect term_facets
Expected Result: totalCount: 0, items: []; term_facets should contain selected country facets (after fix); Bug behavior: term_facets: [] (empty)

Title: TC-010: Verify GraphQL Request Contains Correct Filter Parameters
Preconditions: DevTools available; Pick points modal accessible
Steps:
1. Open DevTools Network tab
2. Select "Australia" and "Canada"
3. Search for "TEST"
4. Inspect request body
5. Verify keyword
6. Verify facet
Expected Result: filter contains address_countryname:"Australia","Canada"; keyword: "TEST"; facet includes address_countryname

Title: TC-011: Empty Search String Behavior
Preconditions: Pick points modal accessible with filters applied
Steps:
1. Select country filters
2. Click in search field, type nothing, click Search
3. Observe results
4. Observe badge
Expected Result: Treated as no search; All filtered locations displayed; Badge remains visible

Title: TC-012: Special Characters in Search With Filters Applied
Steps:
1. Select "United States of America"
2. Search for "@#$%^&*()"
3. Observe badge
4. Observe chip
Expected Result: Badge "1" remains visible; USA chip remains visible

Title: TC-013: Very Long Search String With Filters
Steps:
1. Select multiple countries
2. Enter 200+ character search string
3. Observe badge
Expected Result: Badge remains visible regardless of search results

Title: TC-014: Rapid Filter Toggle During Search
Steps:
1. Select "Australia"
2. Search for "NOTFOUND"
3. Quickly add "Canada" filter
4. Quickly remove "Australia" filter
5. Quickly add "Japan" filter
6. Verify all changes reflected
Expected Result: Badge count always matches selected filters; Updates correctly during rapid changes

Title: TC-015: Badge Styling Consistency
Steps:
1. Select 1 country
2. Select 9 countries
3. Select 10+ countries (if available)
4. Search with no results
Expected Result: Badge shows correct count with consistent styling; Single and double digit numbers properly styled

Title: TC-016: Chip Display Consistency During No-Results
Steps:
1. Select "Australia" and "Canada"
2. Search for "ZZZZZ"
3. Verify chip appearance
4. Verify close (×) buttons
5. Click close on one chip
Expected Result: Chips have same styling as before search; Close buttons functional; Chip removed and badge updates
